data.title: Sonic Research Highlights Quantum Vulnerability in Proof-of-Stake Blockchains
data.description: Sonic Research has identified a significant vulnerability in most proof-of-stake blockchains, which rely on elliptic-curve signatures and aggregation schemes. According to NS3.AI, these systems are susceptible to quantum attacks. Sonic Research suggests that its SonicCS technology can transition to post-quantum security by altering its signature scheme, while maintaining its core consensus design.

data.title: Cannabis Vape Gudtrip Faces Criticism Over Blockchain and AI Claims
data.description: Gudtrip, a cannabis vape product from Puffpaw, faced significant criticism on April 20 due to its claims of integrating cannabis, blockchain rewards, and AI tools into a single device. According to NS3.AI, the product promises users the ability to earn cryptocurrency rewards while using the vape. Puffpaw founder Reffo Tse also joined in the criticism, questioning the viability of the product by asking, "how do I short this?"

data.title: Charles Schwab to Launch Bitcoin Trading Services Soon
data.description: Charles Schwab has announced plans to introduce direct Bitcoin trading services in the coming weeks. According to NS3.AI, this move is part of the company's broader initiative to enhance its cryptocurrency offerings. The update, which focuses on Bitcoin (BTC), was initially reported by Solid Intel. This development marks a significant step for Charles Schwab as it aims to provide more comprehensive educational content and trading options for its clients interested in digital assets.

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations could lead to substantial liquidations on major centralized exchanges. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum's price falls below $2,211, the cumulative liquidation of long positions could reach $1.066 billion. Conversely, if Ethereum's price surpasses $2,427, the cumulative liquidation of short positions could amount to $719 million.

data.title: AI TRENDS | AI-Generated Music Dominates New Uploads on Deezer
data.description: AI-generated tracks now constitute 44% of new daily uploads on Deezer, amounting to nearly 75,000 tracks each day. According to NS3.AI, despite this significant presence in uploads, AI music only accounts for 1% to 3% of total streams on the platform.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 76,000 USDT with a 1.57% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 20, 2026, 18:02 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 76,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 76,057 USDT, with a narrowed 1.57% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: STOCKS | Market Reaction Muted Amid US-Iran Conflict
data.description: The latest quarterly earnings season has commenced, yet even companies surpassing Wall Street's expectations are experiencing minimal stock-price increases. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this trend underscores the market's focus on the ongoing US-Iran conflict. Despite strong financial performances, the geopolitical tensions appear to be overshadowing corporate achievements, leading to subdued market reactions.

data.title: Chinese National Arrested in Argentina for Alleged $49.4 Million Crypto Fraud
data.description: Argentine police have apprehended a Chinese national accused of orchestrating a $49.4 million cryptocurrency fraud in Nigeria. According to NS3.AI, the suspect allegedly enticed investors with promises of substantial returns through a crypto platform, subsequently blocking all withdrawal attempts. The individual was detained by airport authorities while attempting to enter Argentina using a counterfeit Paraguayan passport. Argentine officials are currently processing the extradition of the suspect to Nigeria.

data.title: AAVE Experiences Significant Decline, Retests Long-Term Support
data.description: AAVE is currently trading near $91, marking a substantial decrease of nearly 75% from its peak in August 2025. According to NS3.AI, Santiment data indicates the largest exchange inflow cluster since March 2026, as the token approaches its long-term support near the daily trendline.

data.title: U.S. Indo-Pacific Command Appoints Special Assistant for Strategic Priorities
data.description: Jason Lowery has been appointed as the Special Assistant to the commander of the U.S. Indo-Pacific Command. According to NS3.AI, Lowery will provide advice on strategic priorities impacting the Department of Defense and the Indo-Pacific region.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 630 USDT with a 1.22% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 20, 2026, 17:50 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 630 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 630 USDT, with a narrowed 1.22% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Partner Warns of Potential Equity Market Blip Amid Rate Cut Concerns
data.description:
Goldman Sachs partner Bobby Molavi has expressed caution regarding the current state of the equity market, describing it as "delicately poised." According to NS3.AI, Molavi advises investors to be wary of last week's rally, suggesting that it may be prudent to fade the recent gains.

Molavi highlights concerns over slower-than-anticipated rate cuts and unresolved conflict risks, which could potentially lead to market disruptions. He also notes that the HALO theme is favoring investments in heavy assets with low obsolescence, indicating a preference for stable, long-term holdings in the current economic climate.

data.title: Iran's Parliament Speaker Criticizes 'Digital Oil' Amid Strait of Hormuz Crisis
data.description: Iran's parliament speaker, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, has criticized the concept of 'digital oil' during the ongoing Strait of Hormuz crisis. According to NS3.AI, the International Energy Agency reports that approximately 20 million barrels of oil per day passed through this strategic chokepoint in 2025. Bloomberg highlighted in March that Hyperliquid's oil-linked perpetual contract saw a surge in activity, generating over $1.2 billion in 24-hour trading volume as tensions in the Middle East escalated.

data.title: ECB President Lagarde Warns of Potential Rate Hikes Amid Fiscal Support
data.description: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde has indicated that extensive fiscal support measures could compel the ECB to raise key interest rates further. According to ChainCatcher, Lagarde's comments highlight the potential monetary policy adjustments in response to fiscal actions within the Eurozone. Her statement underscores the delicate balance between fiscal policy and monetary stability in the region.

data.title: Ethereum Whale's Bold $90.8 Million Bet on Ether's Upside Potential
data.description:
An Ethereum whale has made a significant move by opening a long position on Ether (ETH) valued at $90.8 million, signaling confidence in the altcoin's potential for further gains. According to Cointelegraph, this development comes as the ETH/USD pair trades at $2,280, marking a 32% increase from its low of $1,750 on February 6. The price holding above $2,200 offers optimism amid anticipated market volatility. Analyst AlphaBTC highlighted that strong retail sales could push yields higher, delaying Federal Reserve cuts, while weak data might encourage risk-on bets. Key macroeconomic factors, including Federal Reserve commentary and PMI data, are expected to influence market movements, with geopolitical risks adding potential volatility.

Market participants are closely watching a trader with a notable track record who has opened a $90.8 million long position in ETH with 20x leverage. Analyst TAnotepad also noted another whale, identified as 0x6C851, who has opened a $61 million ETH long position at 20x leverage with an entry point around $2,303 on HyperLiquid. These strategic moves align with continued inflows into spot Ethereum ETFs, which have seen net inflows of $426 million over seven consecutive days. Additionally, global Ethereum investment products recorded $328 million in inflows during the week ending April 17, reinforcing the view that whales and institutions see the recent ETH price rebound above $2,400 as a positive development that could pave the way toward $3,000.

Ether's price action has formed an ascending triangle pattern on the daily chart, with a potential breakout target of $3,230, representing a 41% increase from current levels. The pattern will resolve if the ETH/USD pair breaks above the triangle's resistance line at $2,400. However, resistance from the $2,350-$2,500 zone, marked by the 50-day exponential moving average (EMA), could pose a challenge. Beyond that, the 200-day EMA at $2,640 is the next significant hurdle. Analyst Micro2Macr0 suggested that a breakout from a multi-year ascending triangle could lead to a 60%-100% ETH price rally. As Cointelegraph reported, if ETH closes above the $2,400 resistance, it could set the stage for a recovery toward $2,800 and potentially $3,050 in the coming days or weeks.

data.title: EVAA Token Distribution Increases Circulating Supply by 26.47%
data.description: A recent report from Arkham reveals that a specific address has distributed 1.75 million EVAA tokens to seven new addresses within the past hour. According to Odaily, this distribution is valued at $1.3923 million and represents approximately 26.47% of the total circulating supply, which currently stands at 6.61 million tokens. The EVAA token is currently priced at $0.7975, marking a 16.44% increase over the past 24 hours. Its circulating market capitalization is now $5.27 million.

data.title: LayerZero OApp Contracts: Security Configurations Revealed
data.description: Dune Analytics has reported that nearly 47% of approximately 2,665 active LayerZero OApp contracts have utilized a 1-of-1 DVN setup in the past 90 days. According to NS3.AI, another 45% of these contracts employed 2-of-2 configurations, while around 5% used 3-of-3 or higher setups. KelpDAO's rsETH, which was recently targeted in an exploit, was part of the 1-of-1 group.

data.description: On Apr 20, 2026, 16:58 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,300 USDT and is now trading at 2,299.830078 USDT, with a narrowed 0.54% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Waller Addresses Government Comments Impact on Policy
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller has stated that government comments do not pose a threat to the Federal Reserve's policy decisions. According to NS3.AI, Waller made these remarks during an interview, emphasizing the independence of the Fed in its policy-making process. He reassured that external opinions would not influence the central bank's approach to managing economic conditions.

data.title: Market Sentiment Turns Cautious Amid Strong Buying Interest, Glassnode Reports
data.description:
On April 21, Glassnode released a report indicating that while buying interest remains robust, providing some price support, market sentiment is shifting towards caution. According to BlockBeats, data shows that the cumulative volume delta (CVD) for spot trading has turned negative, signaling increased selling pressure and emerging bearish sentiment. Meanwhile, centralized exchanges are experiencing high trading activity, maintaining strong market participation.

In the futures market, an increase in open interest suggests rising risk appetite, but the decline in long funding rates and a sharp drop in perpetual contract CVD indicate traders are more willing to pay a premium for short positions, reflecting a rise in bearish sentiment.

In the options market, demand for downside protection has decreased, potentially easing bearish sentiment. However, the contraction in open interest may imply profit-taking, which could affect future volatility. The narrowing of volatility spreads suggests a shift in market sentiment from risk pricing to neutrality.

The ETF sector is a highlight, with the MVRV ratio and net inflow of U.S. spot ETFs rising, enhancing profitability and investor interest. Trading activity has significantly increased, showing growing enthusiasm for participating in Bitcoin through regulated channels, with market sentiment cautiously optimistic.

Regarding liquidity, the share of hot money has decreased, and the negative change in realized market value has narrowed, indicating dominance by old money and easing net outflows. The supply ratio between short-term and long-term holders remains stable, with long-term holder confidence solid.
